templates.name: Brand safety baseline
templates.description: Default guardrails for claims, medical/financial advice, and tone floors.
templates.guardrails:
- Do not promise guaranteed results, cures, or financial returns.
- Avoid discriminatory or harassing language.
- If the brief is ambiguous on compliance (health, finance, legal), stay conservative and generic.
- Do not invent statistics, quotes, or endorsements; only use facts implied by the brief.
